name: test_full_payment_close
description: Test that agent calls negotiate_calc when consumer offers full payment

conversation.content: Hi, this is Dani from Accord.
This call may be recorded for quality purposes. Is that alright with you? This call is an attempt to collect a debt.
Thank you. May I have your full name and date of birth to verify your identity?
My name is John Smith, born June 15, 1985.
Thank you John. For security, what are the last 4 digits of your phone number?
Perfect. You have a balance of $3,500. What can you pay today?
I can pay the full $3,500 right now.
